title: ECharts Segment 13
summary: This segment spans PRs #21067-#21432, covering ECharts v6.0.0-rc1 development. Major areas include the new Matrix coordinate system and component, Chord chart type addition, scale system improvements (Log scale negative exponent rounding, Time scale custom values formatter, Interval scale enhancements), jitter layout for scatter charts, axis break feature (helpers and implementation), label system refinements (layout margin, labelLine smooth reset, label style improvements), visual tokens system, dark mode lightness algorithm, build tooling overhaul (license headers pre-commit hook replacing husky, headerUtil), and various chart-type fixes across radar, pie, candlestick, gauge, and line charts.
instructionPreview: `/workspace/requirements/` contains every requirement as a separate file. Each file describes one change request. Read them all, implement every one. Order does not matter, but some changes depend on others.
instruction:
You are an autonomous engineer. The repository at /workspace is at an earlier state of a real-world project.

`/workspace/requirements/` contains every requirement as a separate file. Each file describes one change request. Read them all, implement every one. Order does not matter, but some changes depend on others.

moduleDag.description: This segment spans PRs #21067-#21432, covering ECharts v6.0.0-rc1 development. Major areas include the new Matrix coordinate system and component, Chord chart type addition, scale system improvements (Log scale negative exponent rounding, Time scale custom values formatter, Interval scale enhancements), jitter layout for scatter charts, axis break feature (helpers and implementation), label system refinements (layout margin, labelLine smooth reset, label style improvements), visual tokens system, dark mode lightness algorithm, build tooling overhaul (license headers pre-commit hook replacing husky, headerUtil), and various chart-type fixes across radar, pie, candlestick, gauge, and line charts.

nodes.label: Core Utilities
nodes.description: Shared utilities including types.ts, model.ts, number.ts (cartesian small number rounding), jitter.ts (jitter overlap avoidance), styleCompat.ts, layout.ts, and time.ts. Extensive updates across the segment. Touched by PRs 21067, 21070, 21103, 21108, 21126, 21132, 21138, 21145, 21147, 21352.

nodes.label: Scale System
nodes.description: Log.ts (negative exponent rounding, small ticks), Interval.ts (min/max nullable), Time.ts (custom values formatter). Core numeric scale infrastructure for axis rendering. Touched by PRs 21107, 21120, 21126, 21138, 21145, 21352.

nodes.label: Matrix Coordinate System
nodes.description: New Matrix coordinate system: MatrixModel (configuration and API), MatrixDim (dimension length support), MatrixBodyCorner, and matrixCoordHelper. Supports headless matrix creation via x/y length. Touched by PRs 21108, 21132, 21138, 21145, 21147, 21191, 21410.

nodes.label: Matrix View Component
nodes.description: MatrixView rendering component that draws the matrix grid, labels, and cell content. Dark-mode color support. Touched by PRs 21070, 21108, 21410.

nodes.label: Axis Components
nodes.description: AxisBuilder (axis break rendering integration), axisBreakHelper and axisBreakHelperImpl (new axis break feature for discontinuous axes). Touched by PRs 21070, 21103.

nodes.label: Label System
nodes.description: LabelManager, labelLayoutHelper (margin support), labelStyle (style improvements), labelGuideHelper (smooth reset). Significant refactoring for label collision and layout. Touched by PRs 21103, 21425.

nodes.label: Coordinate System Core
nodes.description: axisCommonTypes, axisTickLabelBuilder (formatter index support), axisDefault, Axis.ts. Core axis infrastructure shared across chart types. Touched by PRs 21147, 21220, 21313, 21347, 21387, 21432.

nodes.label: Cartesian Coordinate
nodes.description: Grid.ts (label containment), legacyContainLabel (new helper extracted). Touched by PRs 21103, 21132, 21138, 21145, 21147.

nodes.label: Radar Coordinate
nodes.description: RadarModel clockwise option support. Touched by PRs 21143, 21147.

nodes.label: Chord Chart (New)
nodes.description: New Chord chart type: ChordEdge (edge rendering), ChordPiece (arc segment rendering), and export entry. A new chart type added in this segment. Touched by PRs 21132, 21138, 21145, 21147, 21197.

nodes.label: Scatter Chart
nodes.description: jitterLayout (new jitter layout algorithm for scatter overlap avoidance). Touched by PRs 21132, 21138, 21145, 21147.

nodes.label: Pie Chart
nodes.description: PieView, PieSeries (tangential no-flip fix), labelLayout (margin fix). Touched by PRs 21103, 21147, 21258.

nodes.label: Radar Chart
nodes.description: RadarView blur itemStyle and clockwise option support. Touched by PRs 21081, 21124, 21147.

nodes.label: Line Chart
nodes.description: LineView areaStyle empty dimension fix and lines loop symbol flip. Touched by PRs 21147, 21219, 21380.

nodes.label: Candlestick Chart
nodes.description: Candlestick series encode render fix. Touched by PR 21325.

nodes.label: Custom Series
nodes.description: customSeriesRegister (registration infrastructure updates). Touched by PRs 21132, 21138, 21145, 21147.

nodes.label: Chart Helpers
nodes.description: Shared chart helper utilities including whiskerBoxCommon. Touched by PRs 21320, 21325.

nodes.label: Graph Chart
nodes.description: GraphSeries nodeScaleRatio type fix. Touched by PRs 21147, 21229.

nodes.label: Gauge Chart
nodes.description: Gauge progress auto-color fix. Touched by PRs 21147, 21224.

nodes.label: Bar Chart
nodes.description: Bar zero-size labels fix. Touched by PR 21218.

nodes.label: Sunburst Chart
nodes.description: Sunburst root label centering fix. Touched by PRs 21147, 21306.

nodes.label: ECharts Core
nodes.description: Core echarts.ts (instance management) and ExtendedElement.ts (new element extension infrastructure). Touched by PRs 21103, 21127, 21132, 21138, 21145, 21293.

nodes.label: Visual System
nodes.description: tokens.ts (new visual tokens system for theming), design token infrastructure. Touched by PRs 21097, 21132, 21138, 21145.

nodes.label: VisualMap Component
nodes.description: ContinuousModel (range comparison fix), VisualMapModel (unbounded range, dark mode inRange). Touched by PRs 21104, 21113, 21147, 21347.

nodes.label: Theme
nodes.description: dark.ts dark mode lightness algorithm improvements. Touched by PRs 21093, 21114, 21176.

nodes.label: Tooltip Component
nodes.description: TooltipHTMLContent (listener unbinding fix). Touched by PRs 21087, 21402.

nodes.label: DataZoom Component
nodes.description: SliderZoomModel (handleLabel optional, single-point position). Touched by PRs 21147, 21175, 21196.

nodes.label: Marker Components
nodes.description: MarkLineModel, MarkerModel, MarkerView (z option support). Touched by PR 21117.

nodes.label: Toolbox Component
nodes.description: ToolboxModel (dataView dark mode, emphasis color). Touched by PRs 21147, 21384.

nodes.label: Data Layer
nodes.description: SeriesData.ts (each example docs, data iteration). Touched by PRs 21117, 21294.

nodes.label: Export Declarations
nodes.description: Export entries for chord chart and TypeScript types. Touched by PRs 21147, 21411.

nodes.label: Internationalization
nodes.description: langEL (Greek locale addition) source and dist. Touched by PRs 21119, 21127, 21138, 21145.

nodes.label: Build System
nodes.description: License header tooling (addHeader.js, checkHeader.js, headerUtil.js), build templates, pre-publish script. Replacing husky-based checks with new pre-commit hook infrastructure. Touched by PRs 21132, 21138, 21145, 21179, 21411.

nodes.label: Project Infrastructure
nodes.description: .husky/pre-commit hooks, .headerignore, package.json (js-yaml, validator deps), notice year 2026. Build/lint tooling overhaul. Touched by PRs 21132, 21138, 21145, 21146, 21147, 21411, 21448.

edges.label: number.ts utilities used by scale calculations
types.ts and model.ts provide shared definitions
model.ts helpers used by matrix coordinate
scale implementations drive axis tick generation
axis types define component rendering options
matrix model drives matrix view rendering
matrix uses cartesian sub-coordinates
axis labels use label system for layout
label layout used by pie label positioning
visual tokens define theme color values
dark theme colors affect visualMap rendering
echarts core types re-exported via export entries
ExtendedElement used by custom series rendering
radar model provides coordinate data for radar chart
SeriesData iteration used by marker views
build scripts referenced by pre-commit hooks
whiskerBox common used by candlestick rendering
jitter.ts provides scatter jitter algorithm
axis common types used by dataZoom extent handling
locale files registered through core echarts
